commit_scope: Use /api/health as the local listener probe for the production-manifest kernel-router canary. The public gate and BML attention route were healthy after a83ebf6e, but the deploy workflow failed because the local production-manifest listener check polled /api/utils/kernel_status until timeout.

local_validation.notes: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27974561601 deployed a83ebf6e and public kernel canary passed when run manually afterward. The workflow failed earlier in roll-forward because ensure_kernel_router_canary waited for local kernel-router /api/utils/kernel_status, while Docker health had already proven /api/health healthy.

ci_validation.notes: CI will run after the branch is pushed and the PR opens.

deploy_validation.notes: After deploy, Hostinger Auto Deploy should pass roll-forward and public kernel canary without changing the public route ownership.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; PR checks, deploy, and public kernel canary proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27974561601 failed in roll-forward at ensure_kernel_router_canary: kernel-router listener did not accept local HTTP at /api/utils/kernel_status within 90 seconds.
The same log showed kernel-router reached Docker healthy before the local listener timeout, and Dockerfile.kernel-router health uses /api/health.
Public health reported deployed_sha a83ebf6e370444bf1a3c8806e3cca2298e698e1b after that run.

Manual bash scripts/verify_kernel_canary_public_gate.sh https://api.coherencycoin.com passed after public routing settled, including public-gate, no-header default, BML runtime attention, and explicit fallback.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The production-manifest kernel-router local listener proof should use the same /api/health path as its Docker healthcheck, while the BML sibling continues to prove /api/utils/kernel_status and public canary proves runtime attention.
test_flows: deploy script shell syntax validates locally.
public kernel canary passes after deploy.
